message:
feat(fcp-sdk): runtime extensions and testkit supervisor examples

fcp-sdk (Cargo.toml, runtime.rs, tests/sdk_state_tests.rs):
  Expand the SDK runtime with additional lifecycle hooks and state
  management capabilities. Update dependencies to support new runtime
  features. Add and expand state management tests covering edge cases
  in connector state transitions.

fcp-testkit (Cargo.toml, supervisor_examples.rs):
  Add supervisor example implementations (83 new lines) demonstrating
  connector orchestration patterns: startup sequencing, health checking,
  and graceful shutdown. Update testkit dependencies to match SDK changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
